name: CLX - MGA Insurance Lead Capture v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public CORS endpoint for insurance.crystallux.org (Crystallux Financial Services — a division of Crystallux Inc.) marketing-site lead capture forms. No session-token auth (public); CASL consent enforced client-side + recorded server-side. Inserts a row into leads (vertical_id='insurance') and writes a regulatory_audit_log entry. Rate limiting via Cloudflare in front.
